title: Ross Henery Professional 8PC-BBACR19 Knives, 8 Piece Kitchen Knife Set in Stylish Acrylic Block Set
features: Modern design rotatable acrylic knife block and kitchen knife blades with a quirky white splash design
Contemporary design allows these knives to be a stylish addition to any kitchen
Set includes: 8 inch chef knife, 8 inch bread knife, 8 inch carving knife, 5 inch utility knife, 3.5 Inch paring knife, 1 x Scissors, 1 x honing steel, 1 x potato peeler and acrylic block stand
Ross Hennery professional is an English Brand and has over 10 years of manufacturing experience so you can be assured of the quality.
description: From the manufacturer 8 Piece Acrylic Knife set Ross Henery Professional 8 Piece kitchen knife set Discover the master chef within you. Honing your culinary skills to perfection calls for control and precision. The Ross Henery Kitchen Knife Set lets the casual cook perform any food prep task like a seasoned professional. This 8-piece chefs knives includes everything needed to make prep work easier and more enjoyable: Chef’s knife 8' Bread knife 8' Carving knife 8' Utility knife 5' Paring knife 3.5' Scissors Honing Steel Potato Peeler Stylish Acrylic Block Ross Henery professional has its own quality control on the production line at the factory and will reject any knives that do not meet their high-quality standards, so you can be assured you are getting a good quality knife set. To make quick work of elaborate meal preparation, add the Ross Henery Professional 8 Piece Kitchen Knife Set to your cart today. 8 Piece Set Stylish 8 PIece Block We Manufacture all our own knife sets and use high grade materials in order to offer a fantastic premium product at a reasonable price. Items Included Chef’s knife 8' Bread knife 8' Carving knife 8' Utility knife 5' Paring knife 3.5' Scissors Honing Steel Potato Peeler Stylish Acrylic Block Quality Control We take pride in making sure our products reach the customer in a perfect condition. We have our own quality control on the production line with any sets that don't meet our high standard being rejected Ross Henery professional is an English Brand and has over 10 years of manufacturing experience so you can be assured of the quality. Stylish design More about this set Each of the knives is hand sharpened at the factory, so they come razor sharp out the box. They come with Rubberised handles for extra grip when slicing and dicing.The knives are held in place on the block because it is 100% magnetic. This set would look fantastic in any modern kitchen. Beautiful knives and block give a fantastic modern impression, a real centerpiece in any kitchen With such a stylish and practical block and some of the most common used knives in the kitchen that come razor sharp out the box. Why purchase any other set? Rotatable block meaning you can adjust the way the block faces to suit your needs
